text.en: This output summarizes housing documents and is not legal, lending, or tax advice.
text.pt: Esta saida resume documentos de moradia e nao constitui orientacao juridica, de credito ou tributaria.

text.en: Amounts and dates are extracted from the uploaded document version only.
text.pt: Valores e datas sao extraidos apenas da versao do documento enviado.

text.en: For enforceable obligations, confirm terms with the signed contract and issuer records.
text.pt: Para obrigacoes executaveis, confirme termos com contrato assinado e registros do emissor.
